name: preship
description: API-first accessibility/security/performance scanning platform for vibe-coded apps

scripts.dev: npm run dev:api & npm run dev:web & wait
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @preship/shared && npm run build -w @preship/scanner
scripts.build:apps: npm run build -w @preship/api && npm run build -w @preship/web && npm run build -w @preship/docs
scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules apps/*/node_modules packages/*/node_modules apps/*/dist packages/*/dist
